channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 Midyear Reckoning: Midyear Chaos
item.description: Moviegoers defend themselves against media tyranny.

item.title: The Endless Alarm Over Liberalism
item.description: Thinkers on both sides have exaggerated minor policy disagreements into national crises.

item.title: Iran Overplays Its Hand
item.description: It is difficult to argue convincingly that Tehran's position is especially strong.

item.title: Democratic rift over Israel tested in U.S. Senate primary battle
item.description: Senate candidate Haley Stevens aims to show a Democrat can back Israel and still win the party nomination.
